previous_loop: Create a reusable documentation template for loop records.
residue: Reduced setup time for future documentation loops
next_variable: Test whether the template supports a second documentation topic without redesign.

re_entry_capacity.notes: The loop ended with clean notes, reusable residue, and no dependency on memory.

cap_or_recheck: Recheck only if the next documentation topic requires new sections.
next_loop_command: Run the next documentation loop using the template and record any friction.
